get.description: 서비스 상태 및 버전. 배포/로드밸런서 헬스체크용.

post.description: Assign random MBTI on recruit (server-side) if hunter exists and MBTI is NONE/empty.

Apply a promotion node to a hunter.

Rules:
- Node must exist.
- Node parent must match the last node in hunter.promotionPath (or be None for root).
- choiceGroup can only be taken once.
- statBonus is applied cumulatively to hunter base stats (hp/atk/defense).
- jobId is updated to node.jobId.

Equip item ids for a hunter with validation.

Validation:
- All itemIds must exist.
- Only one item per slot.
- Item seasonId must match hunter.seasonId.
- Item tierId must be <= hunter.tierId (T1 <= T2 ...).
영웅 티어 상승 (T1 -> T2 -> ...). tier_defs에 정의된 티어만 허용.

durationSec.title: Durationsec
durationSec.description: If omitted -> permanent. If provided -> seconds from now.

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: can be negative for rollback; must be non-zero

hunterId.title: Hunterid
hunterId.description: Optional. If provided, directly mutates the hunter snapshot for convenience.

idempotencyKey.title: Idempotencykey
idempotencyKey.description: Optional. If omitted, uses Idempotency-Key header or auto-generates (not idempotent).
